content.en:
The Supreme Hall was established, and the supremes of the human race joined one after another, and Ye Tian also stored many precious secret books in the Supreme Hall Library one by one.

All members of the Supreme Hall can browse these texts for free.

You must know that some of these classics are even very precious, no less than a supreme treasure, but Ye Tian is selflessly dedicated.

After all, with Ye Tian's current identity and status, a mere supreme treasure is not of much use to him, and these classics can enhance the strength of the human race, so he is naturally willing to take them out.

Under the influence of Ye Tian, the other Race Supremes also took out some precious classics, but the real core secret techniques would not be taken out, everyone has selfish intentions, and the Supreme is naturally no exception.

Although Ye Tian was the master of the Supreme Palace, he usually didn't have much to do, so he soon began to retreat.

He has just broken through the realm, and his strength can continue to improve in a short period of time.

For example, the seventeenth set of movements and the eighteenth set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formula, but he had already condensed a half-step chaotic life body, and the Eighteen Golden Body Formula was of little use to him.

As for the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, it is currently only eight layers, and Ye Tian has already cultivated all of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to the consummation realm, and there is no way to continue cultivating.

"Divine power can continue to improve, and it can be accumulated all the way to the limit of divine power, but it doesn't really help much for strength. The rest is to create my own moves, my Heavenly Sword series and Hunyuan series currently only have three styles, if I continue to improve and create a fourth style, it will definitely help me a lot. In addition, the Tiangang Battle Method can continue to be cultivated. At present, he has only cultivated the first five forms of the Tiangang Battle Method, and the Tiangang Battle Method has a total of nine forms. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although he didn't have the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to cultivate, his physical strength could still continue to increase, but he could only improve it slowly or use various elixirs that increased the strength of his physical body.

In short, once you step into the supreme level, in addition to breaking through the beginning of this period of time to quickly improve your strength, it will be difficult to improve your strength after that, and it will be very difficult to improve every step, and it will take a long time or many opportunities.

Just like a third-class supreme like the Mixed Yuan Supreme, he has not been promoted to a second-class supreme for a long time, and it is almost difficult to improve his strength by an inch.

"No matter what, let's try to improve our strength first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian cultivated with all his might, first cultivating the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, and in just 1,000 years, he completely practiced the seventeenth and eighteenth sets of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas to the perfection realm, and the strength of his physical body was raised by a notch.

After that, Ye Tian swallowed a huge amount of resources, and it took nearly 10,000 years to improve his divine power, and the small universe in his body also expanded a lot, and his strength was a step further.

In another 10,000 years, Ye Tian almost exhausted all the elixirs he had obtained in the misty region last time, and finally refined the strength of his physical body again.

As for other aspects, Ye Tian has not made much progress.

After all, the cultivation time is limited, and it is not a simple matter to create the fourth form of the Hunyuan system and the fourth form of the Heavenly Sword system, and in terms of the realm of the Chaos Dao, Ye Tian's progress is also very limited.

He is now in the Chaos Dao Origin Realm, and the Chaos Dao is already difficult to cultivate, and the Chaos Dao Origin Realm has long surpassed the Perfect Origin Realm of other Great Dao.

Now, his Chaos Dao realm is in the middle of the Origin Realm, but it is very difficult to ascend to the late stage, unless there is an amazing opportunity, or use the long years to break through.

But Ye Tian didn't have that much time now, so he could only wait for the opportunity.

"The constant light supernatural power is still an entry, but even if it is only an entry-level constant light supernatural power, it is far beyond those consummation supernatural powers in the universe. The supernatural powers of the universe are all incomplete supernatural powers for chaos, and their usefulness is too low. It's a pity that it's difficult for me to raise the Constant Light Divine Power to Xiaocheng now!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the next tens of thousands of years, although Ye Tian was still in retreat and cultivating and accumulating strength, he would occasionally go out to guide some members of the Heavenly Pavilion and members of the Supreme Palace.

In addition, Ye Tian went to the mist area every 10,000 years, and every time he harvested a large amount of elixir, but even so, he still did not explore the entire inner area of the mist area, let alone the core area.

And with Ye Tian's countless elixirs, the development speed of Tiange was too fast, and there was no need to worry about cultivation talent and resources at all.

Today, Tiange has given birth to three Heavenly Venerables, dozens of Lords and thousands of cosmic gods, such a number even surpasses other supreme-level forces, Tiange is also called the tenth supreme-level force of the human race, and was even called the strongest supreme-level force for a time, because Tiange has the strongest supreme Wanfa Supreme of the human race.

And the three Heavenly Venerables of the Heavenly Pavilion were none other than Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, and Ye Tian's personal disciples—Zhou Tian!

After Zhou Tian came out of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, he joined the Heavenly Pavilion, plus his talent was very good, and he was cultivated by Ye Tian, his strength improved quickly, and he became the third Heavenly Venerable of the Heavenly Pavilion.

In addition, Zhou Tian has had other opportunities to make up for the foundation, and he is not weaker than His Royal Highness the Supreme Level, and he is expected to become the Supreme in the future.

As for Xiao Yue and Ye Yu, although they are not the children of the universe, Ye Tian has continuously endowed them with talents, and even given them countless resources, so that their understanding is getting higher and higher, their potential is getting stronger and stronger, and they have hope to step into the ranks of the supreme in the future.

However, Ye Tian will not be able to continue to improve their strength in a short period of time, unless one day he can transcend and find the resources against the sky in the chaos, he can hope to forcibly raise the two of them to the realm of Heavenly Destiny.

But that must have been a long time later!

......

Terran, Supreme Temple.

this day.

Ye Tian once again summoned the Mixed Yuan Supreme, Kunwu Supreme and others.

"Kunwu Supreme, have you broken through?"

Ye Tian immediately noticed the aura of the Kunwu Supreme, which was much stronger than usual, and had already crossed the boundary between the fourth-rank supreme and the third-class supreme, and became a third-class supreme.

"Thanks to the many elixirs brought by the Ten Thousand Law Supreme from the misty region, as well as some secret books in the chaos, I have some understanding and improvement, and I have broken the shackles in one fell swoop and been promoted to the ranks of the third-class supreme!"

Kunwu Supreme said with a smile.

"How many Supremes does our Terran Race currently have?" we haven't paid much attention to these issues during this time of retreat!" Ye Tian asked.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme said, "There are currently a total of 62 Supremes!"

62 Supreme!

This is a number that the Terrans didn't dare to imagine in the past, when Ye Tian had just cultivated, the Terrans only had 23 supremes, but now at most, there were only hundreds of thousands, and the number of supremes of the Terrans had increased by leaps and bounds to 62.

All the Supremes knew very well that all of this was due to Ye Tian.

It was Ye Tian who brought back a large number of elixirs from the mist region that could be promoted to a mixed-level cultivation talent, that allowed some of the ancient masters of the human race to break through one after another, and with some other opportunities, this was the only way to step into the supreme level.

It's just that these supremes are relatively weak, and they are basically fifth-rank supremes.

But even if it is a fifth-rank supreme, it is also very important to the human race.

Supreme is the standard of a race, and it is also the top combat power, and the human race currently has 62 supremes, which can be regarded as the top among the great races in the universe.

Once there are more than 100 supremes and a second-class supreme is born, that kind of cosmic race can be called a cosmic superfamily.

The Protoss and the Demon Race are the only two cosmic super clans in the universe, but the Terran race will soon be promoted to this rank.
